prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical cinematic soda advertisement poster for 7 Up. A cheerful young woman is lunging forward toward the camera in an energetic selfie-like perspective, holding an opened green soda can extremely close to the viewer in her left hand. She wears a mint green lightweight jacket over a white crop top, white high-waisted shorts, and white sneakers; her brown hair is tied in a messy high bun with loose strands. Her face is covered by a centered opaque rectangular blur block, while the rest of her body and outfit remain sharply detailed. The can is wet with condensation, has a silver pull tab, visible lemon-lime graphics, and the large white-and-red 7 Up logo. A huge curling wave of sparkling water, bubbles, ice-like mist, floating lime slices, green leaves, and splashes wraps around the can and the model, forming a dynamic spiral that leads into the background. Set the scene in a surreal refreshing alpine fantasy landscape with towering snow-covered mountains, waterfalls, turquoise rivers, mossy rocks, lush greenery, and bright tropical accents in the lower distance. Use cool teal, mint, white, and icy blue tones with high contrast sunlight from the upper right, glossy commercial lighting, crisp droplets, and premium beverage-ad photography realism. Add bold distressed white poster typography in the upper left: large stacked headline text “COOL ESCAPE” and smaller all-caps tagline beneath it, “REFRESH YOUR WORLD.”. Composition should be portrait 2:3, ultra-detailed, dramatic wide-angle lens, shallow depth of field on the foreground can and hand, motion frozen mid-splash, no extra products, no extra people, no watermark.
